title: Zooming Web Pages
drDigitalIntro:
Sometimes text on a page is too small to read.
• Click the + button to zoom in and make everything bigger.
• Click the - button to zoom back out.
• Ctrl+0 resets to normal size.
• Let's zoom in to read some tiny text.

playgroundTask.goal: Zoom in to read fine print

steps.say: Go to dailynews.example — type it and press Enter. There's some fine print at the bottom you can't read yet.
Scroll down — see the tiny text? Click the + zoom button twice to make it readable (or press Ctrl+Plus).

drDigitalSuccess: Now you can read the fine print! Ctrl+Plus zooms in, Ctrl+Minus zooms out, Ctrl+0 resets. The - and + buttons in the toolbar do the same thing.
drDigitalHint: Find the zoom control on the right of the action bar and click the + twice to reach 150%.
